analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of alchemy.com/docs examined 2,500 URLs, crawling 2,316 pages with 55.24% coverage of the 4,526-page discovered scope. 5 confirmed broken internal links were found in user-facing documentation. API reference coverage is critically low at 15.19% despite detecting 2,192 API pages. Example code reliability estimate stands at 72.49%, while freshness metadata is visible on only 1.38% of pages.
strengths: Large documentation footprint with 4,526 pages in scope demonstrates comprehensive product coverage
Zero broken repository navigation links; all 5 broken links are confined to user-facing documentation
API page detection successful with 2,192 pages identified (no detection limitations flagged)
Example code reliability estimate of 72.49% shows majority of code samples are functional
Multi-project topology mode indicates organized documentation structure across product lines
risks: Crawl coverage at 55.24% leaves 1,910 pages unexamined; critical issues may exist in uncrawled sections
API reference coverage of 15.19% means 84.81% of API pages lack adequate usage documentation or examples
278 unverified links due to authentication/rate-limiting may hide additional broken links
Freshness metadata on only 1.38% of pages prevents users from assessing content currency
Overall confidence score of 56.79% indicates audit completeness is limited
27.51% of example code may be unreliable or non-functional, risking developer onboarding friction
Links confidence at 25% suggests broken link counts may significantly underrepresent actual issues

prioritized_actions.action: Increase crawl coverage to 90%+ by raising safety cap or enabling authenticated crawl mode to examine remaining 1,910 pages
Implement usage examples and integration guides for API endpoints to raise reference coverage from 15.19% to minimum 60%
Add last-updated timestamps to all documentation pages (currently 1.38% coverage) to improve content trust
Fix 5 confirmed broken internal documentation links and investigate 278 unverified links with authentication bypass
Audit and repair the 27.51% of example code flagged as potentially unreliable to improve developer success rates

limitations: Crawl coverage at 55.24% means nearly half of documentation remains unaudited; findings do not represent complete site health
278 unverified links could not be validated due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks; actual broken link count may be higher
External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code functionality in production environments, or API response correctness
Freshness analysis limited to machine-readable timestamps; editorial review dates and content accuracy cannot be assessed externally
Example reliability is estimated through static analysis; runtime execution, dependency compatibility, and environment-specific failures are not tested
